headline: Celanese Stock Sees RS Rating Climb To 87
summary: The Relative Strength (RS) Rating for Celanese stock climbed into a new percentile Friday, with a rise from 71 to 87.    Risk Management In The Stock Market: How Much Money To Invest Now  This unique rating tracks technical performance by showing how a stock's price movement over the last 52 weeks compares to that of other stocks on the major indexes.

headline: BASFY Advances High-Performance Textile Innovation With Niber
summary: BASF teams up with Niber to develop electrospun nanofiber membranes using Freeflex TPU, targeting breathable textile solutions for next-gen performance apparel.

raw.headline: BASFY Advances High-Performance Textile Innovation With Niber

headline: Does DuPont (DD)ʼs Expanded WAVE PRO Platform Reveal a Durable Edge in Digital Water Solutions?
summary: Earlier this month, DuPont Water Solutions expanded its WAVE PRO online modeling platform to include reverse osmosis and nanofiltration, creating a unified design tool that integrates ultrafiltration, ion exchange, RO, and NF for applications ranging from drinking water and industrial utility treatment to wastewater reuse and seawater desalination. This upgrade, combined with DuPont’s award-winning FilmTec Fortilife wastewater elements and extensive installed base, highlights how its water...
